Connect Your Backend
Set up cloud sync by connecting your Supabase project. Takes 5 minutes — see the SETUP.md file in your download for step-by-step instructions.
Once you enter these, they're saved for everyone using this app. Only do this once during initial deploy.

TOP WORKING WEIGHT — 16 MONTHS
Squat
Bench
Deadlift
PATTERNS
Deadlift is your strongest lift — peaked 285 conventional, 305 trap
Bench technique focus is paying off — consistent form over max weight
April deload = smart timing going into the cut
Conditioning added progressively: ropes, sprints, sled work
Structure: Mon Quad · Tue Push · Wed Pull · Thu Hinge · Fri Speed
CUT STRATEGY
Keep compounds heavy — muscle retention raises metabolism
Supersets boost caloric burn without adding gym time
Conditioning finisher every session: rope, rower, or bike
Isolation ranges 12–15 reps for time under tension
Target: 1–1.5 lb/week loss at 200g+ protein
Primary
Secondary
Not trained
Tap an exercise to expand and log your sets
Tap the circle to mark a set complete — rest timer starts automatically
COACH NOTES
SAVED
Jot down what felt heavy, where form broke down, what to push next week. Notes are saved per day per week. Future you will thank you.

BODYWEIGHT — JAN 2025 → NOW
LOG TODAY'S WEIGHT
Weigh yourself at the same time each day, ideally first thing after using the bathroom. Daily fluctuations of ±2-3 lb are normal — look at the weekly average, not the single day.
BODY MEASUREMENTS
Measure once per week, same time of day. Inches. The scale lies — measurements don't.

TRAINING ACTIVITY · LAST 16 WEEKS
Each square = 1 day. Brightness = how much of the session you completed. Tap a square to jump to that day.
Less
More
PERSONAL BESTS
ACHIEVEMENTS
Unlock badges as you hit milestones. They auto-check based on your data.
PROGRESS HIGHLIGHTS
67 lb lost since starting in Jan 2025 — average of 1.2 lb/week
Deadlift went from 225 → 305 lb (+80 lb) while losing weight
Bench went from 135 → 215 lb (+80 lb) — nearly doubled
Strength-to-bodyweight ratio improving as you cut — rare combo
Running pace climbing from 5.0 → target 6.5 mph over 16 weeks
WEEKLY VOLUME PER MUSCLE GROUP
Sets per muscle group per week. Research-backed targets shown as the green zone. Below minimum = undertrained, above max = risk of overtraining.
PROGRAMMING CHECK
AI WORKOUT BUILDER
Build a new training block powered by Claude AI. Describe your goals, equipment, focus areas, and injuries. The AI returns a complete structured program that replaces your current one.
PROGRAM CRITERIA
QUICK PRESETS
CURRENT PROGRAM
ASK COACH
Got a question? Form, programming, recovery, pain, nutrition — ask anything.
GYM BAG CHECKLIST
MUSCLE FATIGUE
Tap a level for each muscle group based on how it feels today. The readiness score uses this.
WEEKLY CHECK-IN
Log your weight and body measurements every Sunday. Consistent weekly check-ins are how you see the transformation others can't.
DATA BACKUP
EXPORT
Download all your BeeBuildz data as a JSON file. Save this anywhere — iCloud, email, Dropbox. You can restore from it on any device.
IMPORT
Restore from a previous backup. This replaces all current data — make sure to export first if you want to keep anything.
SETTINGS
SCREEN WAKE LOCK
Keeps your screen on during Gym Mode so it doesn't dim or lock mid-set. Automatically activates when you open Gym Mode.
Supported on this device
AMOLED MODE
Pure black background instead of dark gray. Saves battery on OLED displays and makes the lime pop harder.
OFF — Dark gray background
ACCOUNT
—
—
MODULES
Enable or disable training modules. Changes apply immediately.
APPEARANCE
▼
AMOLED MODE
Pure black background. Saves battery on OLED screens and makes the lime pop harder.
—
ACCENT COLOR
Changes the highlight color used throughout the app.
TRAINING
▼
SHOW ADVANCED FEATURES
Enable War Room AI builder, Ask Coach, Stats, and other advanced features.
FOCUS MODE DEFAULT
Start Gym Mode in focus mode automatically — hides nav and all non-workout UI.
TRAIN LIGHT MODE
Scale your session on tough days — 70% weight, half volume, longer rest.
WEIGHT & PROJECTIONS
▼
SHOW PROJECTIONS
Show or hide the Projections section on the Weight tab.
CONSERVATIVE MODE
Assumes 20% slower progress for more cautious estimates.
DATA & PRIVACY
▼
EXPORT
Download all your BeeBuildz data as JSON. Save to iCloud, email, or Dropbox.
IMPORT
Restore from a previous backup. Replaces all current data.
MY USAGE — LAST 30 DAYS
What features you actually use.
CLEAR ALL DATA
Permanently delete all your training data. This cannot be undone.

Scale your session on tough days — 70% weight, half volume, longer rest, or swap for mobility.

A guided 10-exercise flow with auto-advance timer. About 11 minutes total.

ESTIMATED 1RM
WARM-UP PROTOCOL
LAST SESSION
READINESS SCORE

Your readiness score estimates how prepared your body is to train hard today, on a scale of 40-100.

How it's calculated:

Start: 100 points
Heavy fatigue: –10 per muscle group
Moderate fatigue: –5 per muscle
Light fatigue: –2 per muscle
2+ days rested: +5 bonus

What the numbers mean:

85–100: Push it. Try for PRs today.
70–84: Solid training day. Hit your numbers.
55–69: Train smart. Maintain weights, focus on form.
40–54: Recovery day. Light cardio or active rest.

Update muscle fatigue in the Tools tab. The more honest you are, the better the recommendation.

REST TIMER
1:30
BOX BREATHING
4 seconds inhale → 4 hold → 4 exhale → 4 hold. Activates parasympathetic nervous system, drops heart rate fast between sets.
READY
—
EDIT PROFILE
Email:
Member since:
MY PROGRAMS
Save unlimited workout programs. Switch between them anytime without losing your data. Generate new ones via War Room → AI Builder, or import a PDF from your trainer.
IMPORT FROM PDF
Upload a workout PDF from your trainer. AI will parse it into a structured program. Uses your Anthropic API key from War Room.
NAME THIS PROGRAM
TRAINING BLOCKS & VOLUME

A block is 4 weeks of the same exercises with progressive overload week-over-week. This is how your body actually adapts and builds strength.

Week 1Baseline — learn the pattern
Week 2+5 lb compounds, +2.5 isolations
Week 3Peak — heaviest week
Week 4Deload — 70% for recovery

Weekly Volume Targets (sets per muscle group)

Research-backed ranges for hypertrophy. Your program is auto-scored against these on the Stats tab.

Chest 10–20
Back 10–20
Shoulders 8–20
Biceps 8–16
Triceps 6–16
Quads 8–20
Hamstrings 6–16
Glutes 8–16
Calves 6–16
Core 6–16

Rules for Building Your Own Block

Start with 1-2 compound lifts per day (squat, bench, deadlift variants, press, row)
Follow with 2-4 accessories hitting the same muscle groups in different angles
Hit each muscle group 2x per week minimum for growth
Compounds: 3-6 reps heavy · Accessories: 8-12 · Isolations: 12-15+
Keep the same exercises all 4 weeks so you can measure progress

Changing exercises every week is counterproductive — you can't apply progressive overload and can't measure whether you're actually improving.
